name: tool-skills
description: Local CLI tool skills for agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Skill routing notes for local CLI tools.
interface.longDescription: A personal local plugin for CLI-first tool workflows. Each bundled skill explains when to use a local command-line tool, how to verify it, and when to fall back to the host agent's native file and shell tools.
defaultPrompt: Use the right local CLI tool skill for this task.
Use the tool-codesearch skill for natural-language codebase discovery.
Use the tool-officecli skill for Word, Excel, and PowerPoint document workflows.
